title: Stuck cap — Sara joins, both struggle gently with the cork
prompt: Mid-shot on @beach-shore at the gentle calm wet tide line. @Eva already kneeling on the LEFT on the wet sand with both knees softly on the sand, both hands holding the @magic-bottle steady at chest height with curly blonde hair with rainbow bow. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands visible. @Sara already kneeling on the RIGHT next to Eva on the wet sand with both knees softly on the sand, ponytail with bow, both hands gently gripping the small cork stopper of the bottle, tongue poking out softly in concentration as she gently twists. Sara has exactly two arms and two hands visible. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) Sara twists the cork softly with both hands, eyebrows scrunched playfully, tongue out. Sara (warm playful grunt-giggle): "It's STUCK! Why is it so stuck?" (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Eva braces the bottle steady with both hands, both girls leaning in close together over the bottle. Eva (cheerful encouraging): "You can do it! Pull pull pull!" Both girls keep their hands gently on the bottle, twisting and bracing softly together. Cheerful warm kid-show energy. Both girls stay kneeling with knees on the wet sand throughout. STRICT ANATOMY: Sara has exactly two arms and two hands at all times, both gripping the cork. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands at all times, both bracing the bottle. No third hand from either girl. The wet sand stays plain wet sand — no marks, no red, no debris.
